programme.desc: Doug is left heartbroken when his girlfriend Susan calls off their relationship. One day, he comes across an injured duck and decides to take it to a vet, who he starts developing feelings for.

programme.title: Guy Has World's Worst Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: People-pleasing Charlie's lie about breaking up with his girlfriend, Rayna, spirals out of control, leading to chaotic encounters, a bizarre haircut, and a trashed apartment. Ultimately, his deceit is exposed, costing him both Rayna and new interest Zoe, but teaching him the value of honesty.

programme.title: Influencer Stalked By Fan
programme.desc: A famous influencer's family is terrorized by an obsessed fan. Her husband, initially dismissive, realizes the danger. He bravely confronts the stalker, saving his family and highlighting that true strength lies in unity and protecting loved ones.

programme.title: Girl Wants To Be K-Pop Star
programme.desc: A K-Pop-obsessed loner, Amy, endures bullying, but her talent show dreams are rekindled by a supportive brother and a secret admirer. Despite a stage mishap and mean-girl sabotage, Amy's confidence shines, winning over the crowd and her once-skeptical father.

programme.title: Girl Refuses To Be Sterotyped In School
programme.desc: Mary, a Japanese-American teen, struggles to fit in. She's "too Asian" for white peers and "too white" for Asian classmates. Despite constant judgment, she embraces her true self, excelling in cheerleading and art, ultimately finding acceptance and love.

programme.title: From Janitor To Company CEO
programme.desc: Ricky, a high school dropout and former drug dealer, faces his father's constant disapproval. Given a second chance at a janitorial job, he creates a revolutionary chip flavor, rising to COO and finally earning his father's pride.

programme.title: Dad Favors Older Son
programme.desc: Constantly undermined by his father, Joey strives to honor his late brother's dream of attending Stanford. With help from a kind janitor, Joey transforms himself, proving his dedication and ultimately achieving his dream, finally earning his father's pride.

programme.title: Boy Pretends Owning Porshe For A Girl
programme.desc: Insecure teen Eric pretends to be rich to impress Alisha, leading to a disastrous party at his friend's house. Exposed as a fraud, Eric learns honesty is key to genuine connection, while his bully's own secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Teen's First Job Goes Very Wrong
programme.desc: Teen Lamar attempts dangerous TikTok stunts to gain followers and win Lisa's attention. A near-fatal challenge lands him in the hospital, forcing him to shift his focus to mental health and genuine connection, leading to real success.

programme.title: Teen Pranks Goes Too Far On Classmates
programme.desc: Spoiled teen Frank, forced to face life without his wealth, learns the hard lesson of empathy after a cruel prank on a poorer classmate, Greta, backfires. Humbled, he apologizes and gives Greta his new iPhone.

programme.title: Kid Takes Over Dhar Mann Studios
programme.desc: Spoiled actor Shaun Dixon, believing he can run the studio better, is given control for a day. His recklessness causes chaos and alienates the entire crew, forcing him to learn the valuable lesson that there is no "I" in team.

programme.title: Mean Girls Bully Emo Girl for Her Looks
programme.desc: Bullying artist Brooke torments Delilah over her art and appearance. Delilah, struggling with her parents' divorce, transforms her pain into art. Her painting and story move the judges and Brooke, leading to unexpected kindness and connection.

programme.title: Stepmom vs Stepdaughter
programme.desc: Lizzie, a sweet but poor girl, endures her evil stepmother's abuse. She secretly chats with "Cheese Boy," who turns out to be the school's hottest guy, Devin. He exposes her stepfamily's fraud, leading to their arrest, and Lizzie inherits her father's diner.

programme.title: Teacher Calls Child Services on Bad Parent
programme.desc: Grandpa Ernest, recently granted custody of his grandkids after his son's death, loses his job and almost loses the kids to CPS. Determined to provide for them, he leverages his love for gardening into a successful YouTube channel.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: In this hilarious episode, Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson and Kevin Hart do amazing impressions of each other, Dwayne reveals a naughty secret about Kevin and we find out their thoughts on The Rock becoming US president!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: The Eleven
programme.desc: Manchester United fans Flex and KG Tha Comedian debate which players make it into the 13-time Premier League champions' all-time starting XI. David Beckham or Cristiano Ronaldo on the right? Rio Ferdinand or Jaap Stam at the back?

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Psychiatric Nurse, Paul Deacon, reveals what it is like to work in Broadmore Hospital, treating infamous patients such as Ronnie Kray and the Yorkshire Ripper. He discusses the violence he experienced and witnessed as a nurse trying to help.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Crime Scene Cleaner Ben Giles talks about how he set up his own Crime Scene Cleaning business in the early 2000s. He tells us the most disgusting thing he's ever seen and explains why he does a job that 99% of people couldn't stomach.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: This week we talked to Francis Ngannou, Cameroonian mixed martial artist, the world's hardest hitter and the current UFC Heavyweight Champion of the world. Francis told us his incredible life story and if he's gonna have a fight with Tyson Fury.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Patrick Foster's gambling addiction had catastrophic consequences on his career and family life. Here, he tells us about his internal battle with addiction, the millions he's placed in bets, and the vast sums of debt that he racked up as a result.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Jamie Morgan Kane spent 34 years in the California Prison System for a murder he claims he did not commit. Here, he tells us about his tumultuous childhood, his time serving in the Vietnam War and the series of events that led to his arrest.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Former Harry Potter stuntman David Holmes discusses the on-set accident that left him paralysed, his close friendship with Daniel Radcliffe, outdated attitudes towards those with disabilities and how all people can be a force for positive change.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Baz Hulse, who was jailed for 10 years in a prison in India for smuggling diazepam tablets, tells us about his life inside prison, the culture shock he experienced and the mental strength he needed to push through.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Carlos ‘Carlitos' Páez Rodriguez, a survivor of the 1972 Uruguayan Air Force Flight 571 plane crash in the Andes, discusses the plane crashing at an altitude of 11,170 feet and the resulting 72 days surviving extreme cold, avalanches and starvation.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Mandy Hickson, one of the first female fighter pilots in RAF history, takes us through the difficulties she faced being the only woman on her squadron. She also discusses the time she was almost killed by a missile when flying over Iraq.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: The Grand Tour's Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May pit British delicacies against food from around the world, necking Japanese sake and devouring British pork pies. They even attempt to eat a Chinese century egg!

programme.title: Do You Even Know Me?: Episode 13
programme.desc: Ana de Armas and Norman Reedus put their friendship to the test in the ultimate guessing game – and let's just say, Norman might need a few more revision sessions... We put Idris Elba and John Cena in the hot seat to test their friendship! In this episode, the Heads of State stars try to prove who knows the other best... From Idris' hilariously cheeky original DJ name to the movie John can't let him live down.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay, Paul Ainsworth and Nyesha Arrington film a special 'Chef's Edition' of Snack Wars: England Vs USA. Gordon Ramsay throws a Pop-Tart, he judges beans on toast and they all have incredible reactions to Toxic Waste!

programme.title: The Most Relaxing Interview Ever
programme.desc: We treat global superstar JENNIE to The Most Relaxing Interview Ever, full of head massages, sausage dog puppies, an unhinged guinea pig named Carl and a meditative sound bath experience – all while enjoying a well-deserved glass of wine.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Austin Butler and Zoë Kravitz face off in a hilarious UK vs US Snack Wars, putting their taste buds to the test with sour Warheads, traditional black pudding, and a nostalgic childhood British favourite — cucumber sandwiches. In this episode of Snack Wars, Conan Gray decides who has the best snacks: UK & Ireland or USA. Conan teaches us how to make a Nutterbutter and Oreo combo, cries at the sight of carrot cake, and pours the perfect Guinness. But which country will win?

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: Might Have Been

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate
programme.desc: The story revolves around the two sisters of Pragya, from Kumkum Bhagya. Her sisters are Preeta and Shristhi who discover the existence of their mother Sarla and sister Pragya, after their father's death. The sisters try to unite with their mother and sister.

programme.title: Trinayani
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: Guddan
programme.desc: Guddan, a cheerful yet clumsy young woman, ends up marrying Akshat Jindal aka AJ, a rich businessman with three sons and daughters-in-law. How will Guddan face the challenges that await her?

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.desc: Behind the facade of running an NGO for hearing and speech impaired children, the demure Jagadhatri Sanyal is, in reality, a fiery intelligence officer code-named JAS.

programme.title: Gangaaa

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Maitree
programme.desc: The lives of three friends, Nandini, Maitree and Ashish get inexplicably intertwined when an accident brings unexpected changes in their lives.

programme.title: King of Hearts

programme.title: Second Chances

programme.title: El Chapo & Sean Penn: Bungle in the Jungle
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look inside the ill-fated rendezvous with Sean Penn, El Chapo and actress Kate Del Castillo. El Chapo, the most wanted, most dangerous and richest drug lord in the world, agreed to meet Penn in the remote mountains of Sinaloa state to grant the first and only interview since he escaped from Mexico's number one security prison. For the first time, cameras go inside that rendezvous and reveal the true story of what happened behind the scenes, who orchestrated the meeting, the identities of the two mystery men travelling with Penn and the secret Hollywood figure who's really pulling strings, with a $6 million offer for El Chapo's life story rights. What was the real reason that Sean Penn took this risky and reckless journey? What was the real motive for the actress Kate Del Castillo to set up a meeting that could have led to both their deaths? And what were the secret texts between El Chapo and Kate, long before the day of the 'Bungle In The Jungle'?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Craig joins Kristina at Sango Lodge in the heart of the Save Valley Conservancy where they explore the vast, rugged wilderness. Kristina joins Byrce Clemence and his anti-poaching team as they demonstrate the effectiveness of the anti-poaching dog unit. Tracking notorious rhino on foot keeps their senses alert. Find out what causes the crew to hit the floor.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Back on the banks of Lake Kariba, Kristina is hosted by the luxurious Bumi Hills Safari Lodge. She tracks lions with her guide Madison, witness elephants swimming and challenges Madison to a fishing bet and finally gets to tick an elusive cat off her bucket list.

programme.title: Nature's Weirdest
programme.desc: All habitats present difficulties, but the challenges of the desert are more obvious than most – scorching heat and a lack food and water make them one of the most hostile environments on the planet. But with great challenges come incredible solutions. Despite the deadly conditions, a hardy band of unique animal and plant species have adapted to meet the inhospitable desert conditions head on. Each one finds its own way to exploit and conserve the available food and water in a daily struggle for survival.

programme.title: Dangerous Trails: Elephants in the Minefield
programme.desc: This film tells the story of peace and resettlement in Angola. After decades of civil War, the Elephants are returning via routes riddled with landmines. We show the challenge of both elephants and people reclaiming their land and living together.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: The Bearded Vulture is one of the largest birds of prey in Europe and one of the rarest. With its habitat above the treeline in the alpine mountains, we see one of the largest airworthy birds fly loops during its courtship days and flight for survival on the steep slopes.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: The Grey Seal is Europe's largest water prediator. With its habitat in the fish rich costal areas in cool but not arctic waters we discover that recreation in the sun plays a major role for the seal, but we also see it raiding in dangerous waters.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: The group discovers Roxanne's childhood fear of lizards. Niven takes the opportunity to exploit it.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Agatha is feeling motivated again only to learn that she actually failed her exams and must leave the residency.

programme.title: Under the Spell of Horses
programme.desc: Iceland, the island of longing in the North. The biggest volcanic island in the world is known for its grandiose landscape, for its geysers and glaciers. But it is even more famous for its horses. Icelandic horses are considered the liveliest horses in the whole of Europe with the greatest stamina. They tölt over mossy banks and lava rock unfazed by rivers, glaciers and scree slopes. In Nordic mythology the steed are never far behind the warriors. Where would Siefgried be without his horse Grani, or Odin without Sleipnir. Even the sun wouldn't rise or set if “awake early” and “very quick” weren't pulling their chariot. From the beginning of colonisation, the Icelanders had the kind of close relationship with their horses usually only seen among the horse-riding peoples of Central Asia. And something of this love for horses still exists today. Life without horses would be unthinkable for Haukur Goroarsson, too. The 34-year old lives with his family in Vatnsdalur, a fertile valley in the North four hours by car from the capital city, Reykjavik. For him Icelandic horses are “a sort of Viking on four legs”. The settlement of this inhospitable island on the Arctic Circle would not have been possible without the animals. The stone deserts in the country's interior are too vast to be crossed on foot.

programme.title: Under the Spell of Horses
programme.desc: Proud elegance, silky-shiny coats and a graceful, powerful physique – the supreme Marwari horses have been worshipped in India as magical creatures for thousands of years. People say they descended directly from the Gods, that once when the Gods were sitting round the fire, there was so much soot that one of the Gods had to cry. One of the tears from his right eye changed into a stallion, and one of his tears from the left eye produced a mare. Ever since, the people in Rajasthan have believed that horses are Gods. Maharaja – palaces, temples and citadels, women in colourful saris and men with bright turbans – the land of the Rajas, the king's sons, arouse fantasies reminiscent of One Thousand and One Nights. Lively trading and war-related incidents from the past have led to the emergence of a unique horse culture in the region: Marwaris are the proud horses of the Indian Rajas. Each year in November, the small, barren desert oasis of Pushkar is transformed into a place of pilgrimage for millions of Indians. Everybody who is anybody on the horse scene in Rajasthan - Maharajas, breeders and horse masters - meets at the Pushkar Mela, the turbulent market for over 50,000 horses and camels. Pushkar is the place where the legendary Marwaris are bought and sold.

programme.title: Under the Spell of Horses
programme.desc: Once a year the royal city of Meknes is transformed into an oriental camp. Two thousand curious onlookers gather round the square. More than five hundred riders are expected to take part in this major Fantasia, a warlike display of horsemanship. 56-year old Lachsen Slimani is also obsessed with riding games. He lives with his family on a remote highland plateau in the Middle Atlas. Lachsen is proud because his 18-year old son Mohammed wants to follow in his father's footsteps. For that he needs his own horse, so the tradition goes. Lachsen wants to fulfil this dream for his son. So, in order to get the money together for the horse, he takes off on an adventure and is travelling to Quarzazate, which is also called the Hollywood of the desert.

programme.title: Dust And Stripes
programme.desc: In a never-ending quest for grass and water, the striped herds undertake an annual epic trek across the vast lunar landscape of the Kalahari's Makgadikgadi Pans. Most of the year, the Makgadikgadi is an inhospitable wasteland of windswept, salt-encrusted pans. For the area's water-dependent zebra, the Boteti River on the western edge of the pans is a dry-season lifeline. However, it is also a death trap, with lions waiting in ambush and crocodiles lurking in dark riverside caves.

programme.title: Secret Life Of Deer
programme.desc: 30 million white-tailed deer live in the United States. They have begun to adapt themselves to living in a world of traffic, pets and backyards. In Cayuga Heights, New York, the suburb's residents are trying to get used to this exceptional living arrangement. The deer can be spotted daily from kitchen windows and porches. Life in the suburbs is deer heaven – large areas of grass, no predators and plenty of water means their population is on a steady rise. In this documentary, white-tailed deer are outfitted with special cameras to take the viewer into their world. 'Deercam' allows us to see them in a new light – not frozen in the headlights of a car or as shy residents of the woods, but as intelligent and affectionate family animals.

programme.title: Rewilding: Back to Nature
programme.desc: Worldwide, there are various projects and approaches to give nature more space again. The aim is to create larger wilderness areas that develop with hardly any influence of humans - by reintroducing so-called key animal species and creating a network of wilderness corridors across entire continents. Rewilding promises to be a cost-effective form of conservation in which we can boost biodiversity and protect the climate.

programme.title: The Secret of Migrating Birds
programme.desc: Each year in spring, Israel witnesses a unique spectacle. Many millions of migrating birds cross the land bridge between Africa, Asia and Europe.Their first major roosting place after an exhausting nonstop flight over the African deserts is in southern Israel – a vital stopover. Here they replenish their energy reserves. The flocks of migrating birds are pursued by flocks of ornithologists. Hundreds of birders flood into the port city of Eilat on the Red Sea to take part in the Migration Festival. For a week, Israel's southernmost coastal resort is home to international scientists and amateur birders.

programme.title: One Perfect Day in Kentucky
programme.desc: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF's Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly's ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky's own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly's horse wins the race. At Louisville's Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: For this episode, Ben's planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: This time, Mike's planned 48 hours in New Mexico... And he's determined to show the guys as much of it as possible!! From the White Sands National Park, to Hatch, Santa Fe, Albuquerque and Taos! How do you think he'll get on??!

programme.title: Four Corners

programme.title: Berlin from Above
programme.desc: Unique pictures from above. This documentary shows a different angle of people and country, during a glide flight above the metropolis. More than 25 years after the reunion between East and West Germany, this movie shows pictures from different perspectives. Which visions and dreams marked this region? What changed and what emerged in Germany's tensed city. We take a look from above to see the city and its citizens. Due to high quality flight recordings and panorama pictures, we are able to see how the people make this area their home. The movie unites nature, urbanity, tranquility and the rush of a metropolis. It unites parks and skyscraper canyons, lake capes and wetlands, curvy courses of rivers and straight streets. With exhilarating pictures we take a trip through Berlin- from sunrise til sunset. Due to high quality flight recordings and panorama pictures, we are able to get a glimpse at how the people make this area their home.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: There are very few regions that appear as untouched as the Yukon Delta in eastern Alaska. This fascinating and pristine landscape consists of a maze of swamps and streams that one could easily picture as the cradle of humanity.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: The Ebro Delta lies to the south of Barcelona. Its beaches and lagoons are a unique refuge for migratory and native bird species. The delta is known, for example, for its numerous pink flamingos that nest near the white-glistening salt pans.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: In the heart of Europe lies a unique natural habitat and a landscape characterised by water: the Rhine-Meuse Delta. About a third of the Netherlands lies below sea level right in the heart of Europe, with 3,500 polders as buffer zones for excess water and several cities that are traversed by canals.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: Starting in the untouched Tumucumaque rainforest in the north of the Amazon Delta.

programme.title: Food Unknown
programme.desc: Finland is that one Nordic country that is never on the global cuisine radar. However, the reserved Finns have been quietly perfecting their craft of foraging culture and incorporating it into their unique cuisine. Jonathan Legg explores the entire expanse of the country to understand it's cuisine, and the ethos of the country's top chefs from amazing locally sourced cuisine in Helsinki, to an expedition in Lapland to learn about foraging and the Finnish delicacy, reindeer!

programme.title: Food Unknown
programme.desc: It's the birthplace of Halloween, but the ghosts and ghouls which have canvassed the world have not scared up much interest in Irish cuisine. Mounting a classic motorcycle Jonathan tours a land of mystic traditions, boisterous locals, and iconic scenery. The world's most magnetic pub culture draws him in, border conflict pushes him out, and dark legends pull him around. It's an adventure soaked in rain, lore, and the food of ancestor's past.

programme.title: Khanh Ong's Wild Food
programme.desc: Chef Khanh Ong Travels to Mallacoota, Victoria to explore the seafood delicacies that the area has to offer but decides to make a few pitstops along the way. He learns how to make blue cheese and picks out some wine to match with seafood dishes.

programme.title: Order Up!
programme.desc: Hudson starts his culinary journey in LA, learning from chef Kim Vu and celebrity chef Martin Yan. He covers the basics in the kitchen, sharpens his culinary skills, and creates an artistic dish for Randall Park and his ‘Fresh off the Boat' co-stars.

programme.title: Order Up!
programme.desc: Houston, Texas, known as the land of smokehouses and barbeque, and it's here that Hudson learns all about the fusion techniques to smoke meat, grill fajitas and create barbeque using a wok with the help of MasterChef winner Christine Ha.

programme.title: Order Up!
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Hudson learns about Creole & Cajun flavours from Li'l Dizzy's Cafe & Galatoire's fine dining restaurant. He must cook slowly but flawlessly, to make his own soul food creation, because today he is facing his toughest critic yet.

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.desc: Welcome to Haikou, also known as the Coconut City! Join Tianran experiencing the culinary culture and urban character of this tropical paradise. From light and sweet coconut chicken hotpot to refreshing herbal desserts and spicy rice soup.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. As the SCL World Series Tour continues, athletes will battle it out to claim the yellow leader's position for the season. Don't miss this incredible stage of strength and endurance!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The World's Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we've picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they'll be going all out against each other. It's now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let's start the action.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it's the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it's about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World's Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn't compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts it's the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: EXO 'Crown' MV
programme.desc: 'Crown' is a hard dance song that fuses Atlanta trap drums, heavy metal guitars, and EDM synths to break genre boundaries. Siren effects and powerful vocals heighten the dramatic tension, while the lyrics liken a precious loved one to a crown coveted by many, conveying a desperate resolve to protect them at all costs.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.”

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: What's the nicest thing in the whole world? That's right-doing a good deed! Tyra turns in caps for recycling and helps the whole world! But what do Ricky and Boo do? They just play on the playground.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Do you know what an ear-hamster is? You've definitely come across one more than once! When you hear some melody or song, and then hum it all day-that's an ear hamster!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: What can be done with things that aren't needed? Give them to someone who needs them. Great idea! All that remains is to find the things that really-really aren't needed.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: One day, Tyra takes Ricky with her on a school field trip to the museum.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Summer is the best! You can chase a ball, run on the grass, play badminton, and bask in the sun. But what is there to do when winter comes? Absolutely nothing! You can't even kick a ball.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Mom Saur grows the tastiest berries in the world. Everyone loves them: Dad Saur, Tyra, Ricky, the pterodactyls... Oh! Those pterodactyls again!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: On some days, things just don't go right. The kind of day that gets off on the wrong foot! Unlucky days. Before, every fifth day was like this for Ricky. But everything is about to change!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: There's quite the commotion in Dinocity! A journalist from a well-known TV program has announced that the person who makes the most interesting report about the life of the city will appear on TV.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Grandpa Saur has always dreamed of some extraordinary adventure! For example, to meet a real space alien! For many years, grandfather has been looking in a telescope in the hopes of spotting an alien.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Did you think invisibility cloaks existed only in fairytales? No way! Boo has his dad's wildlife photography cloak. It lets you camouflage with any environment, so that no one will notice you.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Ricky and Tyra love playing with their dad. But they're already a little tired of Dinopoly, ring-toss, and puzzles. But resourceful Dad Saur has come up with a new game: "The Floor is Lava."

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: One day, Ricky finds a lamp in a pile of old trash. It looks just like a magic lamp with a genie inside! Though no genie actually comes out of it.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: What can be scarier than stories told late at night, in a tent, by the lamplight? When shadows tremble on the wall, and even the sweetest little ghost story sounds seriously scary!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Kraken is the favourite pet of the Saur family! He follows Ricky and Tyra everywhere. This time, Kraken was playing with them in the yard. And then he got lost!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Today is Good Deeds Day in DinoCity! The townsfolk are planting flowers, feeding homeless pterodactyls, and helping each other. Ricky also decided to do something really kind.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Dinosaurs, as you know, can be very different. Some prefer grass others eat meat. Some of them fly, and some do not have wings. And Ricky is the one without wings. If only he could fly at least once!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: One day, Ricky, Tyra, and their neighbours, Boo, Tim, and his sister, decided to build sand castles.

programme.desc: Blippi visits exciting places to learn about things like zoos, while teaching children about numbers and more!

programme.title: Little Baby Bum: Friends
programme.desc: Everyday moments like bath time, or getting dressed become even more fun with your Little Baby Bum friends!

programme.title: Little Angel: Happy Heroes
programme.desc: Join Baby John and family to learn all about the everyday heroes that take care of us. Who is your hero?

programme.title: Tulipop Tales
programme.desc: Tulipop Tales is an Icelandic animated series where lovable characters embark on magical island adventures, discovering friendship, creativity, and nature's wonders.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Best You Can Bee
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While rehearsing a song alone in her cafe, Strawberry is interrupted by the arrival of Jadeybug. The poor ladybug is stressed out because her twin cousins, Kadiebug and Sadiebug, left her a message that they are coming to visit for a whole week. Jadey is unable to host them because she's having her guest room repainted.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the urging of Honey Pie Pony, Strawberry & Friends decide to put on a Cooking Show. Ginger Snap invents a version of TV, which she calls Berryvision, to broadcast the show all over Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: A fantasy episode in which Strawberry, Rainbow Sherbet, Blueberry Muffin, Coco Calypso, and Seaberry Delight imagine themselves as Mermaids, drawn into a grand adventure.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While enjoying lunch in the café, the girls are interrupted by some music coming from the gazebo. They head outside and find Sadiebug and Kadiebug wearing badges and standing by a banner and podium. A group of chairs are set up in front of them. The twins begin to announce, and then argue, that they are starting a club - a good citizens club. The girls are shocked as the twins argue with each other all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Best You Can Bee
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland. Unfortunately, she's become a bit of a diva in the process, and her self-centered behavior is about to cut her career short.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While at Orange's general store to pick up a package, Berrykin Bloom chats with Orange about the pogostick he gave her to help her reach the upper shelves. She is very appreciative. He ends up getting a package of special berry seeds he ordered, not the vacation magazine Orange thought he came for. He explains how the seeds were a better purchase because of all the benefits to the Berryworks but now he can no longer afford a vacation.
